core_mechanism: Derivation of a macroscopic transport coefficient (momentum diffusivity / shear viscosity) of an interacting many-particle system from microscopic pairwise-collision integrals — Boltzmann-type kinetic transport theory — cross-validated against direct molecular-dynamics integration of the ensemble's equations of motion
brief_reason: The abstract computes the shear-viscosity contribution of the ions via semi-analytical binary-collision methods and Molecular Dynamics simulations and compares the two, which is exactly a kinetic-theory transport-coefficient calculation from two-body collisions benchmarked by many-body simulation.
